Home.title: Welcome to IMDb
Home.description: Watch your favorite movies and TV shows

sections.notificationsDesc: Choose what to be notified about

section1.heading: Our Mission
section1.body: IMDb is the world's most popular and authoritative source for movie, TV show, and celebrity content. Our mission is to help entertainment fans discover, explore, and connect with the content they love. We provide comprehensive information about films, television series, streaming content, and entertainment news from around the globe.

section2.heading: Our History
section2.body: Founded in 1990, IMDb started as a simple collection of movie facts shared by passionate film enthusiasts. Over the years, it has grown into a global platform serving hundreds of millions of users each month. From humble beginnings as a Usenet group, IMDb has evolved into the definitive source of entertainment data, powering everything from casual browsing to industry research.

section3.heading: Our Values
section3.body: We believe in the power of storytelling and the magic of cinema. Our team is dedicated to providing accurate, up-to-date information that helps users make informed decisions about what to watch. We value community contributions, editorial integrity, and innovation in how we present entertainment content to our global audience.

section1.heading: Work With Us
section1.body: At IMDb, we're building the future of entertainment. We're looking for passionate individuals who love movies, TV, and technology. Our team works on cutting-edge problems at scale, serving millions of users worldwide. Explore opportunities across engineering, product, design, marketing, and content.

section2.heading: Engineering
section2.body: Our engineering team builds and maintains one of the world's largest entertainment databases. We work with cutting-edge technologies including machine learning, natural language processing, and distributed systems. Engineers at IMDb tackle unique challenges in search, recommendations, data modeling, and real-time content delivery.

section3.heading: Design & Product
section3.body: Designers and product managers at IMDb create intuitive experiences for millions of entertainment fans. From personalized recommendations to rich content discovery, our product teams shape how users explore and engage with movies, TV shows, and celebrities across web, mobile, and connected TV platforms.

section4.heading: Why Join Us
section4.body: IMDb offers a collaborative culture, competitive benefits, and the opportunity to work on products that reach a global audience. You'll be part of a team that is passionate about entertainment and technology, with the resources and support to do your best work.

section1.heading: Press Room
section1.body: Welcome to the IMDb press room. Here you'll find company announcements, media resources, and press contacts. For press inquiries, please reach out to our communications team. We provide journalists and media professionals with the latest news, statistics, and resources they need to cover IMDb and the entertainment industry.

section2.heading: Media Resources
section2.body: Our media resources include logos, brand guidelines, screenshots, and product fact sheets. These materials are available for editorial coverage and press use. All materials should be used in accordance with our brand guidelines. For access to our media kit, please contact the press team.

section3.heading: Press Contacts
section3.body: For press inquiries, interview requests, or media partnerships, please contact our communications team. We aim to respond to all press inquiries within 24 hours. For urgent matters, please indicate the priority in your subject line.

section1.heading: Account Management
section1.body: To create an account, click Sign In and select 'Create your account'. You can manage your account settings, update your email, change your password, and adjust notification preferences from your Profile page. If you forget your password, use the 'Forgot password' link on the Sign In page to reset it.

section2.heading: Ratings & Reviews
section2.body: You can rate any movie or TV show on a scale of 1 to 10 stars. Your ratings help build our community-driven recommendation system. To write a review, navigate to the title's page and scroll to the reviews section. All reviews must follow our content guidelines.

section3.heading: Troubleshooting
section3.body: If you're experiencing issues with the site, try clearing your browser cache and cookies first. Ensure your browser is up to date. For persistent problems, contact our support team with details about the issue, including your browser version and any error messages you encounter.

section1.heading: Get in Touch
section1.body: We'd love to hear from you. Whether you have a question, feedback, or partnership inquiry, reach out to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible. Our support team is available to help with account issues, content questions, and general inquiries.

section2.heading: Customer Support
section2.body: For help with your account, billing issues, or technical support, our customer service team is here to assist. Please provide as much detail as possible so we can resolve your issue quickly. You can also find answers to common questions in our FAQ section.

section3.heading: Business Inquiries
section3.body: For partnership opportunities, advertising inquiries, or licensing questions, please reach out to our business development team. We're always interested in exploring collaborations that enhance the entertainment experience for our users.

section1.heading: We Value Your Input
section1.body: Your feedback helps us improve IMDb. Let us know what you love, what you'd like to see changed, or any features you'd like us to add. We read every submission and appreciate your input. Our product team uses community feedback to guide development priorities.

section2.heading: Feature Suggestions
section2.body: Have an idea for a new feature? We want to hear it. Describe the feature you'd like to see, how it would work, and why it would be useful. While we can't implement every suggestion, we carefully review all ideas and consider them for future updates.

section3.heading: Report a Problem
section3.body: If you've encountered a bug, incorrect information, or a broken feature, please let us know. Include details about what you were doing, what you expected to happen, and what actually happened. Screenshots and your device information are especially helpful.

section1.heading: Acceptance of Terms
section1.body: These Terms of Use govern your use of the IMDb website and services. By accessing or using IMDb, you agree to be bound by these terms. Please read them carefully. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you should not use our services.

section2.heading: User Responsibilities
section2.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree not to use IMDb for any unlawful purpose or in violation of these terms. You must not attempt to access restricted areas of the platform without proper authorization.

section3.heading: Content & Intellectual Property
section3.body: All content on IMDb, including text, graphics, logos, and software, is protected by intellectual property laws. Users may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without permission. User-contributed content remains the property of the contributor, with IMDb granted a license to display it.

section4.heading: Limitation of Liability
section4.body: IMDb provides its services on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis. We make no warranties, express or implied, regarding the availability, accuracy, or reliability of our services. IMDb shall not be liable for any damages arising from your use of the platform.

section1.heading: Information We Collect
section1.body: We collect information you provide when creating an account, including your name, email address, and profile information. We also collect data about your interactions with our platform, such as pages viewed, ratings submitted, and search queries. This information helps us personalize your experience.

section2.heading: How We Use Your Data
section2.body: Your data is used to provide and improve our services, personalize content and recommendations, communicate with you about your account, and analyze platform usage. We do not sell your personal information to third parties. Your privacy is fundamental to how we operate.

section3.heading: Data Protection
section3.body: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. This includes encryption in transit and at rest, regular security audits, and strict access controls for our employees.

section4.heading: Your Rights
section4.body: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information at any time. You can manage your data through your account settings. You may also request a copy of the data we hold about you. For privacy-related inquiries, please contact our data protection team.

section1.heading: What Are Cookies
section1.body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember your preferences, understand how you interact with the site, and provide a personalized experience. IMDb uses cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience.

section2.heading: How We Use Cookies
section2.body: We use essential cookies that are necessary for the platform to function properly, including authentication and security cookies. Performance cookies help us understand how users interact with our site so we can improve it. Functionality cookies remember your preferences, such as language and region.

section3.heading: Managing Cookies
section3.body: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies. Please note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of the platform. You can also opt out of non-essential cookies through our cookie preference center.
